title: Geas Task State
description: Task-scoped runtime index. Points to which agent is currently executing this task and how many verify-fix iterations have been consumed. Distinct from the task contract's 'status' field, which is the lifecycle state.

active_agent.description: Agent currently executing on this task. Null when no agent is active.

verify_fix_iterations.description: Number of verify-fix iterations already consumed on this task.
